channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Could allergy and heartburn pills help with PMS symptoms?
item.description: The trendy DIY treatment might have a theoretical basis, as histamine and hormone links could explain potential relief for premenstrual issues.

item.title: Trump's push for new nuclear reactors reaches final stage
item.description: A Trump-era program has enabled small companies to accelerate testing of new reactor designs, raising concerns about safety and oversight.

item.title: Did neo-Nazi youth groups or 'active clubs' contribute to Belfast riots?
item.description: Following racist mob violence in Northern Ireland, attention has turned to 'active clubs,' a global network of white nationalist youth.

item.title: Three World Cup rivals find common ground in a cross-border beer
item.description: Three craft breweries from the tournament's host nations are using the event to produce a rare cross-border collaboration.
